results.description: DESCRIPTION:THE OBJECTIVE OF THE PROJECT IS TO IMPROVE THE ACCESSIBILITY OF AIR QUALITY SENSORS, INCREASE THE NUMBER OF AIR QUALITY OBSERVATIONS, AND INCREASE THE SPATIAL RESOLUTION OF AIR QUALITY SENSORS USING LOW-COST SENSORS (LCSS). THIS WILL BE ESTABLISHED BY COMPARING THREE LCSS AT DIFFERENT LOCATIONS, NAMELY URBAN, SUBURBAN, AND RURAL AREAS, AT DIFFERENT DIURNAL AND SEASONAL VARIATIONS. THE GOAL OF THE PROJECT IS TO COMPARE THE SENSORS AND EVALUATE THEIR PERFORMANCE ACROSS VARYING ENVIRONMENTAL AND METEOROLOGICAL CONDITIONS.ACTIVITIES:THE TEAM WILL PLACE LCSS IN THREE DIFFERENT OPERATIONAL MODES TO CHARACTERIZE THE HORIZONTAL AND VERTICAL PROFILES OF ATMOSPHERIC PM, WHICH WILL FURTHER ENABLE THE TEAM TO DEVISE CONTROL MEASURES.  THESE MODES VARY IN THE DIMENSIONS THAT THEY SAMPLE: (1) STATIONARY 1D COLLOCATED WITH A PM MONITOR BASED ON THE FEDERAL EQUIVALENT METHOD AT A SUBURBAN SITE, (2) MOBILE ON A MANNED VEHICLE 2D TOURING THE ERAU CAMPUS, AND (3) MOBILE ON UNMANNED VEHICLE 3D FLYING AT URBAN, SUBURBAN, AND RURAL SITES. STUDENTS WILL AID IN THE INTEGRATION, TESTING, AND IMPLEMENTATION OF THE COMMERCIALLY USED SENSORSSUBRECIPIENT:NO SUBAWARDS ARE INCLUDED IN THIS ASSISTANCE AGREEMENT.OUTCOMES:THE OUTCOMES WILL RESULT IN THE IMPROVEMENT OF THE ENVIRONMENT AND HUMAN HEALTH. THIS PROJECT WILL CREATE ACCESSIBLE AND LOW COST SENSORS FOR EFFICIENT MONITORING OF AIR QUALITY. THE SENSOR WILL HELP IDENTIFY THE NEED FOR AIR POLLUTION MITIGATION STRATEGIES. DIRECT BENEFICIARIES OF THIS PROJECT WILL BE GOVERNMENTAL AGENCIES INTERESTED IN AIR RELATED MONITORING AND MEASUREMENTS, RESEARCHERS AND ACADEMIC INSTITUTIONS, COMMUNITY GROUPS, AND PLANNING ORGANIZATIONS.

ACTIVITIES:THE TEAM WILL PLACE LCSS IN THREE DIFFERENT OPERATIONAL MODES TO CHARACTERIZE THE HORIZONTAL AND VERTICAL PROFILES OF ATMOSPHERIC PM, WHICH WILL FURTHER ENABLE THE TEAM TO DEVISE CONTROL MEASURES. OUTCOMES:THE OUTCOMES WILL RESULT IN THE IMPROVEMENT OF THE ENVIRONMENT AND HUMAN HEALTH. THIS PROJECT WILL CREATE ACCESSIBLE AND LOW COST SENSORS FOR EFFICIENT MONITORING OF AIR QUALITY.
